_meta.description: Perfect for repair shops, salons, clinics, gyms, and any appointment-based business. Includes welcome, menu, booking, store info, and AI fallback.
_meta.chatgpt_prompt:
You are helping me set up a WhatsApp chatbot for my business using the Appleberry Messaging OS platform.

I will give you this JSON template. Your job is to:
1. Replace every value marked [LIKE_THIS] with real information about my business
2. Adjust the caption text and menu options to match my services
3. NEVER change these technical fields: type_search, save_data, get_api_data, run, status, type, presenceType, send_to, inputname, api_url, api_config
4. Keep all nextBot chain values working (they link steps together)
5. Return ONLY the complete modified JSON — nothing else, no explanation

FIELD GUIDE (read before editing):
- keywords: words the customer types to trigger this step
- caption: the message the bot sends back ([wa_name] = customer's WhatsApp name)
- type_search: '1' = message contains keyword (flexible), '2' = exact match — do not change
- nextBot: after sending this message, automatically trigger another step using that keyword
- presenceTime: delay in seconds before sending (0 = instant)
- use_ai: '1' = AI generates the reply from the caption as a system prompt
- is_default: '1' = this step catches ALL messages that don't match any keyword
- media: URL of an image to send alongside the text (null = text only)

MY BUSINESS INFO:
Business Name: [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]
Industry / Type: [e.g. iPhone repair shop / hair salon / dental clinic]
Location: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [e.g. Mon-Fri 9am-5pm, Sat 9am-2pm]
Phone / WhatsApp: [+XX_XXX_XXX_XXXX]
Website: [https://yourdomain.com]
Email: [your@email.com]

Main Service 1: [SERVICE_NAME_AND_SHORT_DESCRIPTION]
Main Service 2: [SERVICE_NAME_AND_SHORT_DESCRIPTION]
Main Service 3: [SERVICE_NAME_AND_SHORT_DESCRIPTION]

Pricing examples:
- [SERVICE]: from [PRICE]
- [SERVICE]: from [PRICE]

Booking method: [e.g. WhatsApp, in-store, online link]
Promotion / offer (optional): [ANY_CURRENT_DEAL]

chatbots.name: Start Message
chatbots.caption:
👋 Hello, [wa_name]!

Welcome to [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME].
To get started, simply type the number for the action you'd like to take.
If you have a question, our AI assistant will help.

Type MENU anytime to see all options.
chatbots.description: Greeting — fires when customer says hi/hello/start

chatbots.name: Menu Title
chatbots.caption: *🌟 [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME] — Main Menu*
chatbots.description: Sends the menu title, then chains to the options list

chatbots.name: Navigation Menu
chatbots.caption:
1) [SERVICE_1_SHORT_NAME]
2) [SERVICE_2_SHORT_NAME]
3) [SERVICE_3_SHORT_NAME]
4) Store Info (Hours, Location, Contact)
5) Speak to a Human Agent — type HUMAN
chatbots.description: The numbered options list — update labels to match your services

chatbots.name: Service 1
chatbots.caption:
🔧 [SERVICE_1_NAME] at [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]

[2-3 sentence description of service 1. What it covers, how long it takes, pricing starting from X.]

Want to book a slot?
Reply BOOK to start booking or MENU to go back.

chatbots.name: Service 2
chatbots.caption:
📦 [SERVICE_2_NAME] at [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]

[2-3 sentence description of service 2. Include key selling points and pricing.]

Interested? Reply BOOK to reserve or MENU to go back.

chatbots.name: Service 3
chatbots.caption:
🛍 [SERVICE_3_NAME] at [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]

[2-3 sentence description of service 3. Include specials or popular items.]

Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Store Info
chatbots.caption:
📍 [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]

Location: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone/WhatsApp: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]

Reply MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Human Handoff
chatbots.caption:
👨‍💻 A team member will assist you shortly.
Please wait — response time is usually within a few hours during business hours.

[YOUR_HOURS]

Type MENU to return to the bot.
chatbots.description: Human handoff — pauses the bot and alerts the team

chatbots.name: Booking Step 1
chatbots.caption:
✅ Let's get you booked in!

Please send:
1) Your name
2) Service needed (e.g. [SERVICE_EXAMPLE])
3) Preferred date and time

Reply SUBMIT when done, or MENU to cancel.

chatbots.name: Booking Confirm
chatbots.caption:
🗓 Thank you! We've received your booking request and will confirm availability shortly.

For urgent assistance, type HUMAN.

Type MENU to return.
chatbots.description: Booking confirmation — team to follow up

chatbots.name: Opt-Out
chatbots.caption:
✅ You've been unsubscribed from [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME] broadcast messages.
You won't receive promotional messages anymore.

(Reply START anytime to opt back in.)

chatbots.name: AI Fallback
chatbots.caption:
You are the AI Sales Assistant for [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]. Your role is to guide customers toward making a purchase or booking by answering questions in a friendly, professional tone.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Only answer questions related to [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]
- All prices in [YOUR_CURRENCY] — give 'starting from' estimates only
- Always include a CTA (visit store / WhatsApp / book)
- Respond in under 300 characters
- Include one relevant emoji
- If you cannot answer, respond EXACTLY: 'I don't have that info — type HUMAN to speak to our team or MENU for options.'

BUSINESS INFO:
Name: [YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME]
Type: [YOUR_INDUSTRY]
Location: [YOUR_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]

Services:
- [SERVICE_1]: from [PRICE_1]
- [SERVICE_2]: from [PRICE_2]
- [SERVICE_3]: from [PRICE_3]

To book: [BOOKING_INSTRUCTIONS]

If customer needs a human agent, they can type HUMAN.
If customer wants the menu, they can type MENU.
chatbots.description: AI fallback — catches all unmatched messages. Requires AI provider configured in Settings > AI Providers.
